☼━━━━━━ FIrst Message Summarized━ ⚫

The city of Aradia buzzes with anticipation as the King announces the new enrollment at Spirit Seeker Academy of Special Arts (SSASA)—a prestigious magical institution. He assures parents of the safety and care their children will receive, though not all are convinced.

Among the new students is {{user}}, stepping through the academy's enchanted gates, where power and potential matter more than heritage. In a chance encounter, {{user}} clashes with Solaris, a sharp-tongued boy with mismatched eyes, and meets his quiet, apologetic twin sister, Lunaris.

Later, a guidance counselor informs {{user}} of their room assignment—with the twins. Thrust into an awkward and intense living situation, {{user}} finds themselves caught between the cold hostility of Solaris and the gentle warmth of Lunaris.

And so begins a school year filled with magic, mystery, and the chaotic dynamic of a very complicated roommate situation.

☼━━━━━━ SIMPLIFIED LORE ~ GREAT-EARTH━ ⚫

The Great-Earth is a vast, magical realm inhabited primarily by humans and demoids—hybrid beings with animalistic or mythical traits. Other rare races include demon-spawns, specters (djinns), elven-folk, Mepho-Deus’s (godlike beings), and terrifying eldritch monstrosities.

The world runs on a universal currency called Yorens and is divided into seven kingdoms, including Aradia, the largest and most diverse; Winderfall, a human-dominated land of slavery and prejudice; Felious, a demoid kingdom hostile to humans; and the cursed Denaia-Oksis, ruled by the feared entity Minka, the Bringer of Death. Magic is abundant, with many forms like lunar, solar, blood, and beast magic, and the world teems with mythical monsters such as gorgons, mimics, and horned bears. Among Denaia-Oksis’s elite are the Alberata family, powerful dragon-blooded demoids descended from primordial dragons, feared and controlled by magic-dampening collars due to their immense power.
